description: Compare cell phone plan costs across multiple carriers with complex pricing structures, accounting for base fees, per-line charges, and conditional data overages. Identify the most cost-effective option and the total savings.

natural_language.prompt: A family of 4 needs to compare cell phone plans. Calculate the total monthly cost for three different carriers (including base fees, per-line charges, and data overages), identify the cheapest option, and determine how much they'll save compared to their current $240/month plan.
